# haven — Support

Thank you for using this project. This document explains where and how to get help.

## Where to get help

- For usage questions and general discussion: open a GitHub Discussion (preferred) or a new Issue.
- To report bugs: open an Issue (see "What to include" below).
- For feature requests: open an Issue and label it "enhancement".
- For urgent or sensitive security issues: see SECURITY.md or email the address listed there.

## What we support

- Assistance is provided for issues directly related to this repository.
- We support the latest stable release and the current maintenance release(s) listed in the README. For other versions, community help is recommended.

## Response expectations

- We aim to triage new issues within 10 business days.
- Response and resolution times vary depending on complexity, available maintainers, and community contributions.
- Pull requests are reviewed as time permits. Contributions are encouraged.

## How to file a useful issue

When opening an Issue, please include:

- A clear title and description of the problem or request.
- Steps to reproduce (minimal reproducible example if possible).
- Expected vs actual behavior.
- The commit or tag you are running, and the service/playbook/workflow involved.
- Error messages, stack traces, and relevant logs (mask secrets).

## Contributing and paid support

- Contributions via PRs are welcome — see [contributing](./contributing.md)
- This repository may offer paid support or consulting separately; details (if any) are linked from the README or FUNDING.yml.

## Community & Conduct

- Please follow the [Code of Conduct](./code_of_conduct.md) in all interactions.
- Be respectful and include necessary details to help maintainers assist you quickly.

## Privacy & Data

- Do not post secrets, passwords, or personal data in public issues. Use the security contact for sensitive disclosures.

Thank you for helping us keep support efficient and useful for everyone.
